## Description
<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / enhancement
- [ ] Content update
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] DevOps / config

## Checklist
- [ ] Build passes locally (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Tested in browser (desktop + mobile)
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works
- [ ] New images have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (if below fold)
- [ ] SEO metadata reviewed (title, description, OG)
- [ ] Accessibility tested (focus states, color contrast, screen reader if applicable)
